base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of armored_armadillo_stage — a tile from 1993 mega man x. Armored Armadillo Stage — mine cart. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Armored Armadillo Stage — mine cart; Hadouken capsule
